item.title: Contact
item.description: If you have interesting project(s) that you want me to collaborate with, you can contact me on: Email: ryannswidodo@gmail.com linkedin: rnswidodo1

item.title: Personal information
item.description: About This Page This page contains Widodo’s informal information, which you do not want to know. Or… do you? About Me I enjoy learning and exploring new stuffs, including new devices and technologies. I also love troubleshooting and fixing problems around me (excluding social problems :D). I spend my free time on learning new kanjis and creating interesting stuffs like DIY electronic devices, plastic models, and programs. I also love to play simulation and Real Time Strategies (RTS) games like SimCity, Age of Empires, Command and Conquer series, etc.

item.title: Widodo's resume
item.description: Resume of Ryan Nathanael Soenjoto Widodo, Ph.D. Last updated on: September 30, 2023 About Me Hello world! This is a resume page of Ryan Nathanael Soenjoto Widodo. In 1991, Widodo was born in a loving Indonesian Christian family of 4 persons. Widodo received his Ph.D. in 2022 from the University of Tsukuba, Computer Science Department. Currently, Widodo is actively developing Data engineering tools in Rakuten Travel. Email: ryannsw@osss.cs.tsukuba.ac.jp Google Scholar: https://scholar.
